body.title: Shadow-stream reasoning — dual-path execution + divergence corpus
body.result: ShadowReasoner class + DivergenceRecord + reasoning_context(mode=tutor) path + Jaccard comparison + instance.reasoning_divergence schema + fire_and_forget daemon-thread logging + run_shadow_sync scaffolded + record_turn_divergence convenience + turn_pipeline minimal wire (log-only, env-gated default off). 23 tests. Closes D-preparse-architecture at 7/7.
body.description:
For reasoning stage (NOT preparse — preparse shadow is low-value per design discussion), run Igor's own reasoning path AND the tutor-LLM path in parallel on every turn. If Igor's reply lands first with high confidence, it ships; tutor-LLM's thinking-frame is recorded as a delta-record for later review. If tutor-LLM lands first (or Igor is unconfident), Igor uses the frame to revise. Over time, divergence corpus teaches when Igor is ready to replace LLM-assisted reasoning with his own. Off-policy RL via labeled divergence: where paths disagreed and outcomes were known, Igor learns.

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/cognition/` new `shadow_reasoner.py`; integration point in the reasoning stage callsite; storage for delta-records (new Postgres table `reasoning_divergence` under instance schema — NOT a memory schema, this is training telemetry); `tests/test_shadow_stream.py` new.
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; oop-first (ShadowReasoner class); docs-in-code (divergence-corpus purpose + off-policy learning rationale); test-plan-or-why-not (covered); no-new-memory-schemas (storage is telemetry, not memory — verify with palace rule check at review time).
**Scope boundary:** IN: parallel dispatch of Igor-reason + tutor-reason; first-result-wins output logic; delta-record persistence when paths diverge; confidence comparison; review-later pile for deposited tutor frames. OUT: the actual learning algorithm that consumes divergence corpus (future ticket — T-divergence-learner); cross-session corpus aggregation (future); outcome labeling mechanism (future — needs user-feedback signal integration).
**Test plan:** both paths fire on a reasoning turn; faster-confident path wins; divergence recorded when outputs differ meaningfully (semantic comparison, not exact-match); delta-record schema validated; shadow disabled via env var (IGOR_SHADOW_STREAM_ENABLED); integration test with mocked tutor-LLM verifying first-result-wins logic.
